core_mechanism: a symmetry-constrained perturbative local expansion (effective-field-theory-style derivative expansion): one unknown field is written as a truncated Taylor series in the local value and spatial derivatives of another field, with symmetry arguments and term equivalences collapsing the allowed terms to a minimal set of independent free coefficients
brief_reason: The abstract writes the galaxy density as a Taylor series in the local mass density plus derivative terms (nabla_i nabla_j phi, nabla_i v_j, higher-derivative R^2 nabla^2 delta), then uses symmetry considerations and equivalences to show only two additional free parameters survive to a given order.
